agent1.content:

I understand your need to consult with your spouse; however, I cannot hold off on the identity verification process. Please provide the last four digits of your account number to proceed. Without this information, I cannot assist you further.

I completely understand your position, but I really need to take my time with this. It’s not a straightforward situation for me right now. Maybe I can check in with you later after I’ve had some time to talk things over? I’d really appreciate the chance to sort things out on my end first.

2. **Payment Plan**: Alternatively, we can arrange a payment plan that allows you to pay off your full balance in 3 to 12 monthly installments. This option gives you more time to manage your payments.

I understand that you want to discuss this with your spouse, but I need to emphasize that these offers will expire in 7 business days. It’s essential to make a decision soon to take advantage of these options.
